title: Tarla
desc: Tarla Dalal defies societal norms, empowering herself and countless women through revolutionary cooking techniques. Witness her inspiring journey-join the movement and watch online now today.

title: Jaane Anjaane
desc: Laxmi and her outlaw husband adopt Ramu, a temple-found baby. Years later, Ramu seeks vengeance after cop Hemant wounds Laxmi.

title: Santoshi Maa
desc: Santoshi, a passionate believer, uses her unwavering faith and love to tackle life's challenges, showing that with trust and heart, nothing is too tough to overcome.

title: Ganga
desc: Young widow Ganga faces life's ups and downs as she copes with the loss of her father and husband, striving to find strength and purpose in her new reality.

title: Ramayan
desc: Ram, the eldest son of King Dasharatha, is exiled by his stepmother Kaikeyi. After rescuing his wife Sita from the demon Ravana, epic adventures ensue!

title: Jagadhatri
desc: After an evening of recitation and song, Shreemoti and Rajiv discover four friends dead. Panicked, Shreemoti calls Swayambhu, who arrives and questions Rajiv, farmhouse owner, about the tragedy.

title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak
desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

title: Saru
desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

title: Lakshmi Nivas
desc: A family drama exploring love, loyalty, and personal conflicts in a traditional household.

title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak
desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan

title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Two buddies get caught up in a comical competition to impress each other's wives, leading to a series of outrageous and laugh-out-loud moments that test their friendship!

title: Bangistan
desc: 'Bangistan' is a hilarious satire about two mismatched terrorists who, while posing as each other, embark on a chaotic mission that ultimately promotes unity among religions.

title: Pavitra Rishta
desc: Manav truly loves Archana, but family drama, secrets, and misunderstandings put their relationship to the test. Will their love survive the storm or break under the pressure?
